# Soft29 Async16 Tool18k Contract

## Soft 29
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.29 with quality bias floor 0.27 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 16
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.16 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 1.8k
tool result budgets default to 1800 chars with 30-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
